name: Usun Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Usun Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the flat panel display, customization equipment, intelligent manufacturing system integration, and PCB/FPC industrial automation businesses in Taiwan. It provides dense unpackers; automated handling systems; tap cleaners; polarizers/E papers/OCA/LOCA laminators; PR/OC/PI slit coaters; and LCM+B/L module auto assembly lines. The company also offers mask production equipment, timber industry equipment, de-mura+gamma turing automatic detection equipment, laser scanning system, AVI materials loading and unloading machine, goods retrieval equipment, open cap and remove film machine, auto laminators, automatic sole edge grinding machines, lithium battery production equipment, and LENS mounts. In addition, it provides pallet based automatic storage systems, bin storage systems, warehousing management systems, and sorting systems; and PCB and CCL auto assembly systems, laminated steel auto cleaners, and CCL auto testing and cutting systems, as well as article holders. Usun Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
